pageContext.name: Donquixote Doflamingo (Duel Memories)
pageContext.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release, the Donquixote Doflamingo (Duel Memories) Statue!  This statue of 'Heavenly Yaksha' is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Donquixote Doflamingo from the hit anime One Piece. Standing at approximately 3.5' tall, Donquixote Doflamingo is seen striking their popular and iconic pose.   One Piece fans, be sure to enhance your collection with the Donquixote Doflamingo statue today!
